channel.title: Comments on: Coney Island Sword Swallower – Episode 41
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: David Little
item.dc:creator: David Little
item.description: Taking a trip to Athens this weekend ... I'll see what I can do. Just had another Terrapin Roggenrauchbier this weekend. Man that's a tasty brew!
item.content:encoded: Taking a trip to Athens this weekend … I’ll see what I can do. Just had another Terrapin Roggenrauchbier this weekend. Man that’s a tasty brew!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Thanks so much for the post Zak, we'll certainly give Human Blockhead a taste, as a matter of fact, I think Jesse Cutler is on it! Great series of beers, we've been genuinely impressed with everything we've had so far!! Paul
item.content:encoded:
Thanks so much for the post Zak, we’ll certainly give Human Blockhead a taste, as a matter of fact, I think Jesse Cutler is on it! Great series of beers, we’ve been genuinely impressed with everything we’ve had so far!!
Paul

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Hey Ryan, we'll look into the Terrapin series, David Little (our beer finder) will see if he can work his magic!
item.content:encoded: Hey Ryan, we’ll look into the Terrapin series, David Little (our beer finder) will see if he can work his magic!

item.title: By: David Little
item.dc:creator: David Little
item.description: What did you call me? I'm not "average" bull!
item.content:encoded: What did you call me? I’m not “average” bull!

item.title: By: Zak Davis
item.dc:creator: Zak Davis
item.description: Hey boyz. Thanks again again. I'm always psyched to watch your show (especially when it features our beers). The artwork on the labels are actually based on the current sideshow freaks in the Coney Island Circus Sideshow. You'll be happy to know that we just launched Coney Island Human Blockhead, our 10% abv lager. I'll be really curious to see how you like it. Cheers!
item.content:encoded: Hey boyz. Thanks again again. I’m always psyched to watch your show (especially when it features our beers). The artwork on the labels are actually based on the current sideshow freaks in the Coney Island Circus Sideshow. You’ll be happy to know that we just launched Coney Island Human Blockhead, our 10% abv lager. I’ll be really curious to see how you like it. Cheers!

item.title: By: Ryan
item.dc:creator: Ryan
item.description: If you guys are able to you guys should try to do some of the Terrapin Volume series of beer. They are on the 4th volume right now which is called Dos Cocos.
item.content:encoded: If you guys are able to you guys should try to do some of the Terrapin Volume series of beer. They are on the 4th volume right now which is called Dos Cocos.

item.title: By: Connie
item.dc:creator: Connie
item.description:
I can't wait to try this one -- a melody of hops. Maybe it's the fuggles calling my name.
The labels ARE cool... if you like scary clowns and female swordswallowers -- gee nothing implied there -- how about the label for the Albino Python... hmmmm... Just promise me that if you try the Human Blockhead, no one will hammer a nail into his nasal cavity on film.
But seriously, Coney Island Sword Swallower sounds awesome.
item.content:encoded:
I can’t wait to try this one — a melody of hops. Maybe it’s the fuggles calling my name.

The labels ARE cool… if you like scary clowns and female swordswallowers — gee nothing implied there — how about the label for the Albino Python… hmmmm… Just promise me that if you try the Human Blockhead, no one will hammer a nail into his nasal cavity on film.

But seriously, Coney Island Sword Swallower sounds awesome.
